justification: The issue describes a deadlock condition when `numpy` is imported from within a `dlopen()` context on glibc < 2.34 with MKL BLAS, which is explicitly labeled as a bug in the GitHub issue.
current_state_summary: The issue has been closed but related issues remain open. The classification and probable code areas are inferred from the issue title, body, and related issues.

related_issues.title: BUG: calling np.sqrt on an array containing only floats, but of dtype object, will crash
BUG: Confusing error message when `numpy` importing `numpy.__config__` raises `ImportError` for legit reasons
